heading: Authorization of appropriations; income covered into Treasury
label: 285e Authorization of appropriations; income covered into Treasury

children.label: a
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, for the purchase of twenty thousand shares of capital stock of the Bank, $200,000,000.

children.label: b
children.text: Any payment made to the United States by the Bank as a distribution of net income shall be covered into the Treasury as a miscellaneous receipt.
